name: claude-code-hwp-mcp
description: MCP server for HWP (한글) document automation via pyhwpx COM API. 118 RPC handlers (Python). v0.8.2: rule-based form filling engine (Phase 5A-G). form_profile + placeholder_detector (R1-R6 rules) + cleanup_all_placeholders (multi-method fallback, section heading 보호) + smart_fill_table_auto (auto-fit font_size/align) + mark_review_required + form_fill_auto (composite pipeline). 146 unit tests. 사용자 원칙: '수천개의 양식을 모두 학습할 수 없기에 그때그때 양식에 따라서 달라짐을 알아야합니다' → hardcode 없이 rule 기반 동적 적응.

scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=commonjs -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('python -c \"import pyhwpx\"',{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){console.log('\n[claude-code-hwp-mcp] pyhwpx 미설치. 실행하세요: pip install pyhwpx pywin32\n')}"
